name: Avalo Pizarro
description:
__Height:__ 505 cm (16'6")
__Affiliations:__ Blackbeard Pirates; Impel Down (former)

Avalo Pizarro is a new member of the Blackbeard pirates. Known as "Corrupt King", he was one of the criminals who was given a life sentence in Level 6 of Impel Down, where their crimes were so atrocious they were effectively erased from history itself.
